class.name: point_cloud_transport/class_override_pub
class.description: Publisher whose transport name and message type are declared per-class.

class.name: point_cloud_transport/lib_fallback_pub
class.description: Publisher that inherits transport name and message type from the library.

class.name: point_cloud_transport/lookup_pub
class.description: Publisher that gets transport name from its lookup name and has no message type.

class.name: point_cloud_transport/lookup_sub
class.description: Subscriber that gets transport name from its lookup name and has no message type.
